# FreePFP.ai

> FreePFP.ai is a free AI-powered profile picture generator that transforms uploaded photos into professional LinkedIn headshots, anime avatars, and 12+ artistic styles using face-preserving InstantID technology.

## What is FreePFP.ai?

FreePFP.ai is a web-based AI tool that generates profile pictures from user-uploaded photos. Users choose from 12+ unique styles — including LinkedIn Professional, Anime, Alt/Goth, Cyberpunk, Fairycore, Cottagecore, Vaporwave, Dark Academia, Old Money, Grunge, Indie Sleaze, and Fantasy — and the AI produces a stylized portrait in seconds while preserving the user's facial identity.

## Key Facts

- **Price**: Free (1 transformation per day). Credit packs available from $7.99 (100 credits) to $79.99 (1,000 credits).
- **Technology**: Built on InstantID face-preserving AI via Replicate.
- **Styles**: 12 unique styles spanning professional, artistic, and alternative aesthetics.
- **Privacy**: Photos are not stored. Processing occurs in real-time via Replicate and is not persisted on FreePFP.ai servers.
- **Signup**: Basic account required for generation. No credit card needed for the daily free transformation.
- **Output**: High-resolution images suitable for LinkedIn, Instagram, Discord, X, and other platforms.
- **Built by**: The AI Barn (theaibarn.com)
- **Contact**: hello@theaibarn.com
- **URL**: https://freepfp.ai

## Available Styles

| Style | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| LinkedIn Professional | Corporate headshot with clean background and soft studio lighting |
| Alt / Goth | Dark alternative aesthetic with moody lighting |
| Anime | Japanese animation / cel-shaded style |
| Fairycore | Whimsical fairy aesthetic with soft pastels |
| Cyberpunk | Neon-lit futuristic sci-fi look |
| Cottagecore | Rustic pastoral charm with natural lighting |
| Indie Sleaze | 2000s indie rock grainy film aesthetic |
| Dark Academia | Moody literary / scholarly vintage style |
| Vaporwave | 80s retro with pastels and glitch effects |
| Old Money | Classic wealthy aesthetic with timeless elegance |
| Grunge | 90s rock and roll edgy texture |
| Fantasy | Mythical character art with dramatic lighting |

## How It Works

1. Upload a clear, front-facing photo (selfie or portrait works best)
2. Select one of 12+ styles and optional mood/palette settings
3. The AI generates a stylized profile picture in ~15-30 seconds
4. Download the high-resolution result

## Technical Details

- **Face-Preserving AI**: Uses InstantID (zsxkib/instant-id on Replicate) which maintains facial identity during style transfer
- **No Photo Storage**: Uploaded images are processed in real-time and discarded after generation
- **Daily Reset**: Free credits reset at midnight UTC each day
- **Platform**: Web application, no download required
